title: Thai Larb Beef Salad
description: A spicy and sour Thai salad made with crispy fried beef, herbs, and chilies. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.

ingredients.name: Beef (thinly sliced)
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality beef for best results

ingredients.name: Thai basil
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with sweet basil

ingredients.name: Chili peppers
ingredients.notes: Use Thai chilies or substitute with jalapenos

ingredients.name: Crushed crispy fried shallots
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with regular shallots

instructions: Crisp-fry the beef in a pan with a little oil until golden brown. Set aside.
Chop the Thai basil, mint leaves, and chili peppers. Set aside.
In a large bowl, combine the crispy fried beef, chopped herbs, fish sauce, lime juice, and peanuts.
Toss everything together until well combined.
Transfer the salad to a serving platter.
Garnish with crushed crispy fried shallots and serve immediately.
